content.en:
"Hey, a lot of people summoned me!"

Ye Tian had just walked out of the small realm and said in surprise.

He had been in the small realm for a hundred years, and the small realm had blocked any means of communication, so he had not received any messages at all, but as soon as he came out, these messages came to him.

"Most of them are the summons of Yanglong Zhenjun!"

Ye Tianxin said.

Yanglong Zhenjun was his subordinate, and he didn't enter the battlefield ruins at the beginning, but now he has also come in, and he has sent him a lot of messages during this period, but he has not accepted them.

Secondly, there is the transmission of the Yunzi Priestess, the Yunzi Priestess has now entered the battlefield ruins again, and it seems that she has found a ruin, and wants to cooperate with him again, but this is fifty years ago, and this cooperation is estimated to be unattainable.

In addition, there are also some messages from the True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Temple asking for help or asking for help, which are basically relatively old, and there has been almost no information in the past ten years.

Obviously, many people should know that he is now missing.

Ye Tian took a moment and replied one by one.

Yanglong Zhenjun got Ye Tian's reply and quickly summoned him.

Yanglong Zhenjun didn't ask Ye Tian why he didn't reply for a hundred years, after all, it was too normal for Zhenjun to retreat and cultivate for a hundred years, and it was relatively normal to cultivate for hundreds of millions of years.

It's just that in this period, there are countless great opportunities, and it is rare for a true monarch to retreat for so long.

Yanglong Zhenjun thought that Ye Tian had got a chance and digested it in a hundred years, so he didn't dare to ask too much.

Subsequently, Yanglong Zhenjun focused on some of the things that had happened in the past hundred years.

Hearing the content of Yanglong Zhenjun's message, Ye Tian roughly understood the situation of the battlefield ruins.

"I didn't expect that there would be many dojos in the ruins of the battlefield!"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

Although the battlefield ruins are very large, they are not known to be many times smaller than the realm, and they are not even as large as a universe, and such a huge area of the entire Chaos Realm has only given birth to a little Dao Ancestor.

But now, in such a large area as the battlefield ruins, there are many Dao Ancestor dojos, which shows how many Dao Ancestors are in this area.

The strength of the domain realm can be glimpsed from this ruin.

The dojo was born one by one, coupled with the birth of many places of great opportunity that were not weaker than the dojo, which attracted many Dao Ancestor incarnations to come, and even fought for this, some True Monarchs were implicated and fell one after another, and even fell many half-step True Ancestors.

As for the whereabouts of the incarnation of the Lanyue Dao Ancestor, Yang Long Zhenjun did not know.

After all, the Yang Dragon True Monarch is just an ordinary True Monarch, and it is very good to be able to survive in places such as the battlefield ruins, where can you still get the whereabouts of the Dao Ancestor incarnations.

Ye Tian learned that the Yang Dragon True Monarch and a group of Void Heaven Hall True Monarchs were cultivating in a small place of chance, so he didn't go over.

With the help of his might, the Yang Dragon True Monarch mixed very well in the Void Heaven Palace, and joined forces with a group of True Monarchs who were not strong, as long as they were not too unlucky or too greedy in the battlefield ruins, they could barely save their lives.

Therefore, Ye Tian was not too worried.

"Lanyue Dao Ancestor, Tumen Dao Ancestor, Fengbo Dao Ancestor, Mengyue Dao Ancestor, you dare to hunt me down, now that I have come out, it is time for me to hunt you down!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Before, his strength was not good, and it was difficult to deal with the Dao Ancestor incarnations.

But now, he has cultivated the Nine Extremes True Body Technique to the seventh extreme, and his strength has skyrocketed a lot, which is far from being comparable to before.

Other than that.

He also perfected the Blood River True Body, Divine Power, God Extermination, Three-Element Integration, and Void Shift, all of which were Origin Divine Powers, and they were already considered to be medium-grade Origin Divine Powers, and all of them had been cultivated to the extreme realm;

It is very difficult to cultivate the Origin Divine Power to the extreme realm, if you want to spend a long time, even if the True Monarchs have created their own Origin Divine Powers, few people have cultivated them to the extreme realm, but Ye Tian has cultivated it in such a short time.

Of course, this cost him another Heavenly Soul Pill.

Besides.

Ye Tian has created another Origin Divine Power - Yin and Yang Pole Knife!

The Yin and Yang Pole Knife is a combination of Yin and Yang Avenue and the Dao of the Origin Divine Power to create the Origin Divine Power, and once created, it is directly comparable to the Origin Divine Power of the middle grade, and the potential is very great, and there is hope that it will be perfected to the level of the Upper Grade Origin Divine Power in the future.

The Yin and Yang Polar Knife is an attack on the Origin Divine Power, and it has a great increase in Ye Tian's strength, and the move is silent, instantly slashing the enemy's body, even if the True Ancestor has a strong defense, I am afraid it will be difficult to block Ye Tian's Yin and Yang Polar Knife.

It can be said that Ye Tian doesn't know how strong his strength is now, and he really wants to meet the incarnation of Lanyue Dao Ancestor right now and fight with them.

It's a pity that he can't find the incarnation of Lanyue Daozu and the others.

Previously, Ye Tian had indeed cast the Myriad Void Life Technique on the Dao Ancestor incarnations, leaving traces on them.

However, the Infinite Void Life Technique is still relatively difficult for the True Monarchs to discover, it is a supreme tracking secret technique, but for the strong above the True Ancestor, this magical power is relatively weak, and it can be easily discovered.

And the Dao Ancestor incarnations could naturally easily discover the imprint of the Myriad Void Life Technique, and they could easily remove the imprint.

At this moment, Ye Tian couldn't sense the imprint, and it must have been lifted by the Dao Ancestor incarnations casually.

In other words, Ye Tian couldn't find the Dao Ancestor incarnations now.

"I can only let the True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall pay attention to it, and once you find Lanyue Dao Ancestor and the others, notify me immediately!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

As for whether the true monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall would help, he was not worried at all, after all, he was now very powerful in the Void Heaven Palace, and the first true monarch on the True Monarch List plus the identity of the Daozi, the other true monarchs naturally did not dare to offend him.

As a result, all Ye Tian summoned the true monarchs of the Void Heaven Palace.

For the first time, the True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall learned about Ye Tian's transmission, and they were all shocked.

After all, Ye Tian dared to investigate the Dao Ancestor incarnations, what was this for?

Many people speculated that Ye Tian had a grudge against these Four Great Dao Ancestor incarnations and wanted to find trouble with them?

Some True Monarchs thought that during this time, Ye Tian disappeared, and as soon as he appeared, he looked for the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors, could it be that he was chased and killed by the incarnation of the Four Great Dao Ancestors before, and was forced into some special relics, and he only came out recently?

Battlefield ruins somewhere in the dojo.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor quickly learned the news about Ye Tian, and couldn't help but smile: "My little apprentice is not small, he dares to trouble the Dao Ancestor incarnation, but with his talent and potential, there is really hope of defeating the Dao Ancestor incarnation!"

Others don't know Ye Tian, but he naturally knows very well.

At the level of the Heavenly Monarch, you can achieve the unity of spirit and spirit, and you can get the ticket to enter the Dao Ancestor in advance, without the need for the ancestral monument and any means, and it is also a ten-star god who will be promoted, and he is a transcendent person.

In terms of the increase in many foundations, Ye Tian's ultimate limit at the True Monarch level far exceeded that of other True Monarchs, and even he didn't know what level Ye Tian could reach.

Therefore, he was not worried about Ye Tian at all, but felt that the four Dao Ancestor incarnations were a little troublesome.
